info.name: Event API
info.description:
With the Event API, you can post an individual user event.

You need to set below environment variables to use this collection

- `event_url` : Moloco's staff will provide accurate host information.
    
- `event_api_key` : Please review the [API Key ](https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/docs/api-and-sso-credential-management) guide for information on generating an API key
    
- `platform_id` : Moloco's staff will provide platform_id information.
    

API reference: [https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/reference/rmpeventapi_postuserevent](https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/reference/rmpeventapi_postuserevent)

body.raw:
{
  "id": "ID",  // Recommended. Unique ID generated by the client that could be used as an identifier. The length should not exceed 128 characters.
  "event_type": "EVENT_TYPE",  // Supported EventTypes.
  "timestamp": "TIMESTAMP",  // Unix timestamp in milliseconds that the event happened at. (e.g., 1617870506121)
  "channel_type": "CHANNEL_TYPE",  // ChannelType enumerates available channel types. Simply using APP and SITE is fine, but you can also further distinguish DESKTOP_SITE and MOBILE_SITE for web users.
  "domain": "DOMAIN",  // Set domain to a value that can identify the domain portion of your website's URL. We recommend you keep the same value across your website and application if they share your backend.
  "user_id": "USER_ID",  // User identifier used by the platform. This should typically be the sign-in ID used within the platform, and is highly recommended to be hashed prior to being sent to Moloco. Please provide this value whenever available to achieve optimal performance. If the value is unknown for any reason, please leave empty and do not fill in a default or random value.
  "device": {
    "os": "OS",  // OS of the device. 'ios' or 'android' must be included for the App channel type.
    "os_version": "OS_VERSION",  // Device OS version, which is taken from the device without manipulation or normalization. (e.g., '14.4.1')
    "persistent_id": "PERSISTENT_ID",  // Alternative ID to track users regardless of sign-in status. This can typically be an ID associated with the device that the user is on, and is highly recommended to be hashed prior to being sent to Moloco. Please provide this value in addition to the user_id whenever available to achieve optimal performance. If the value is unknown for any reason, please leave empty and do not fill in a default or random value. For further information, please refer to this guide: https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/docs/generating-persistent-identifiers
    "model": "MODEL",  // Device model, which is taken from the device without manipulation or normalization. (e.g., 'iPhone 11 Pro')
    "ua": "UA",  // User Agent. (e.g., 'Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 14_4_2 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Mobile/111FFF')
    "language": "LANGUAGE"  // ISO-639-1 alpha-2 language code. (e.g., 'en')
  },
  "items": [  // Items information related to the event. Required for ADD_TO_CART, ADD_TO_WISHLIST, ITEM_PAGE_VIEW and PURCHASE event types.
    {  // Item object
      "id": "ID",  // Unique identifier of the Item.
      "price": {  // A monetary amount in a specific currency.
        "currency": "CURRENCY",  // Currency enumerates available currencies.
        "amount": 0  // Amount of money. (e.g., 12.34)
      },
      "quantity": 0,  // Quantity of the item. Recommended.
      "item_group_id": "ITEM_GROUP_ID",  // Unique identifier of the Item Group. id and/or item_group_id must be provided.
      "seller_id": "SELLER_ID"  // Unique identifier of the seller of the item. This field is required for MSPI integration unless the seller cannot be associated with that item for the specific event.
    }
  ],
  "revenue": {  // A monetary amount in a specific currency.
    "currency": "CURRENCY",  // Currency enumerates available currencies.
    "amount": 0  // Amount of money. (e.g., 12.34)
  },
  "search_query": "SEARCH_QUERY",  // Query string for the search. Required for SEARCH event.
  "custom_id": "CUSTOM_ID",  // Alternative ID to track users regardless of sign-in status or device. This ID should be provided as a third option following the user_id and device.persistent_id, and is highly recommended to be hashed prior to being sent to Moloco. This ID must be provided if both the user_id and device.persistent_id fields are left empty. Please do not fill in a default value, and instead randomize it if you must, but we recommend you send some ID that can be used to track users even if for a short time span. Please reach out to Moloco if you have further questions about this ID.
  "page_id": "PAGE_ID",  // Page ID should be a uniquely assigned value for each page in the app or web site. 
  "referrer_page_id": "REFERRER_PAGE_ID",  // Similar to referer in HTTP, this value indicates from which page the user came to the current page.
  "shipping_charge": {  // A monetary amount in a specific currency.
    "currency": "CURRENCY",  // Currency enumerates available currencies.
    "amount": 0  // Amount of money. (e.g., 12.34)
  },
  "decision_track_id": "DECISION_TRACK_ID",  // Track ID for the event. Track ID is generated by a call to the Decision API. Fill in this field accordingly if the user event is to be associated with a Decision API response.
  "__test_field__": "__TEST_FIELD__"  // TEST ONLY - injected by --generate-fixtures
}

exec: // Function to generate a UUID with a timestamp
const timestamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[-:.TZ]/g, ""); // Generate timestamp (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS)
// Generate request_id and set it as an environment variable
